name: Vizsla Silver Corp.
description: Vizsla Silver is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company headquartered in Vancouver, BC, focused on advancing its flagship, 100%-owned Panuco silver-gold project located in Sinaloa, Mexico. The company aims to become a leading silver producer by implementing a dual-track development approach, which involves advancing mine development while simultaneously conducting district-scale exploration. With a significant resource base and ongoing feasibility studies, Vizsla Silver is committed to responsible mining practices as it works to unlock the potential of the Panuco district, which is recognized for its high-grade silver and gold mineralization.
